extension.description: Monitors Kodi logs, classifies issues with a cheap LLM, attempts auto-fixes via OpenRouter tool-use agent, surfaces results via Telegram bot. V1 personal use on Android TV.
extension.news: 0.2.0: phone-driven setup. TV shows a QR code + live progress indicator; phone scans, opens a local web page, does all input. Old TV-keyboard wizard kept as "Manual setup" fallback. Backed by a token-gated local HTTP server with strict CSP, host-header guard, and bad-token self-shutdown. 0.1.6: wizard heavily condensed — each step is one screen + one input. Was ~13 OK-to-continue dialogs, now ~7. Less reading, faster setup. 0.1.5: replaced wizard's example bot-token string with a clearly-fake placeholder; GitHub secret scanner was flagging the realistic-looking example as a possible leak. 0.1.4: first-launch toast is passive (no auto-opening the wizard mid-playback); settings page still has the shortcuts. 0.1.3: wizard auto-launches on first Kodi boot until configured; settings page now has Run Setup Wizard + Open Status Panel buttons up top. 0.1.2: beginner-friendly Telegram + OpenRouter onboarding (multi-screen, step-by-step, branches for first-timers). 0.1.1: branded icon + fanart; polished setup wizard + status panel. 0.1.0: initial V1 release.
